title: Credential Exchange — Issue
description: issuer → holder. The issued credential — cleartext for a known holder, or a sealed bundle for an unknown / invite holder. Exactly one of credential_response or sealed.

credential_response.description: Cleartext OID4VCI Credential Response. The `credential` is a JSON string (SD-JWT-VC compact) or a JSON object (W3C Data-Integrity VC with its proof). The holder infers the format from the value shape.

sealed.description: An armored vta-sdk sealed-transfer bundle (SealedPayloadV1::IssuedCredential). Used when the credential is secret-bearing or issued to an unknown holder (invite / air-gap). Only the holder can open it; an out-of-band SHA-256 digest pins integrity.
